016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Delete;
021import androidx.room.Insert;
022import androidx.room.OnConflictStrategy;
023import androidx.room.Query;
024import androidx.room.Update;
025import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity.User;
026import java.util.Collection;
027import java.util.List;
028
029/**
030 * Data Access Object (DAO) interface for {@link User} entity. Declares CRUD operations
031 * for managing user accounts and preferences.
032 */
033@Dao
034public interface UserDao {
035
036  /**
037   * Inserts a single user into the database.
038   *
039   * @param user User instance to insert.
040   * @return ID of the newly inserted user.
041   */
042  @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.REPLACE)
043  long insert(User user);
044
045
046  /**
047   * Inserts multiple users into the database.
048   *
049   * @param users Collection of users to insert.
050   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted users.
051   */
052  @Insert
053  List<Long> insert(Collection<User> users);
054
055  /**
056   * Inserts multiple users into the database.
057   *
058   * @param users Variable number of users to insert.
059   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted users.
060   */
061  @Insert
062  List<Long> insert(User... users);
063
064  /**
065   * Updates an existing user in the database.
066   *
067   * @param user User instance with updated values.
068   * @return Number of rows updated.
069   */
070  @Update
071  int update(User user);
072
073  /**
074   * Updates multiple existing users in the database.
075   *
076   * @param users Variable number of users with updated values.
077   * @return Number of rows updated.
078   */
079  @Update
080  int update(User... users);
081
082  /**
083   * Deletes a user from the database.
084   *
085   * @param user User instance to delete.
086   * @return Number of rows deleted.
087   */
088  @Delete
089  int delete(User user);
090
091  /**
092   * Deletes multiple users from the database.
093   *
094   * @param users Variable number of users to delete.
095   * @return Number of rows deleted.
096   */
097  @Delete
098  int delete(User... users);
099
100  /**
101   * Retrieves a user by their ID.
102   *
103   * @param userId User ID.
104   * @return LiveData containing the user, or {@code null} if not found.
105   */
106  @Query("SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = :userId")
107  LiveData<User> select(long userId);
108
109  /**
110   * Retrieves a user by their username.
111   *
112   * @param username Username to search for.
113   * @return LiveData containing the user, or {@code null} if not found.
114   */
115  @Query("SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = :username")
116  LiveData<User> selectByUsername(String username);
117
118  /**
119   * Retrieves a user by their email address.
120   *
121   * @param email Email address to search for.
122   * @return LiveData containing the user, or {@code null} if not found.
123   */
124  @Query("SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = :email")
125  LiveData<User> selectByEmail(String email);
126
127  /**
128   * Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
129   *
130   * @param oauthKey OAuth authentication key.
131   * @return LiveData containing the user, or {@code null} if not found.
132   */
133  @Query("SELECT * FROM user WHERE oauth_key = :oauthKey")
134  LiveData<User> selectByOauthKey(String oauthKey);
135
136  /**
137   * Retrieves all users from the database, ordered by username.
138   *
139   * @return LiveData containing a list of all users.
140   */
141  @Query("SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY username ASC")
142  LiveData<List<User>> selectAll();
143}
